chapter_title.ar: بَابُ مَا يُجْزِئُ مِنْ حَجَّةِ الْإِسْلَامِ وَ مَا لَا يُجْزِئُ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 38 – What suffices from the Hajj of Al-Islam and what does not suffice

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (17/165)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (17/165)
text: قُلْتُ لِأَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) بَلَغَنِي عَنْكَ أَنَّكَ قُلْتَ لَوْ أَنَّ رَجُلًا مَاتَ وَ لَمْ يَحُجَّ حَجَّةَ الْإِسْلَامِ فَحَجَّ عَنْهُ بَعْضُ أَهْلِهِ أَجْزَأَ ذَلِكَ عَنْهُ فَقَالَ نَعَمْ أَشْهَدُ بِهَا عَنْ أَبِي أَنَّهُ حَدَّثَنِي أَنَّ رَسُولَ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) أَتَاهُ رَجُلٌ فَقَالَ يَا رَسُولَ اللَّهِ إِنَّ أَبِي مَاتَ وَ لَمْ يَحُجَّ فَقَالَ لَهُ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) حُجَّ عَنْهُ فَإِنَّ ذَلِكَ يُجْزِئُ عَنْهُ .

en.hubeali: Abu Ali Al Ashary, from Muhammad Bin Abdul Jabbar, from Safwan Bin Yahya, from Ibn Muskan, from Aamir Bin Ameyra who said,

‘I said to Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup>, ‘It has reached me from you<sup>asws</sup> that you<sup>asws</sup> said, ‘If a man dies and had not performed Hajj, a Hajj of Al-Islam, so one of his family members performs Hajj on his behalf, that would suffice from him’. So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Yes. I<sup>asws</sup> have it (the Hadeeth) from my<sup>asws</sup> father<sup>asws</sup>. He<sup>asws</sup> narrated to me<sup>asws</sup> that a man came over to Rasool-Allah<sup>saww</sup>, so he said, ‘O Rasool-Allah<sup>saww</sup>! My father died and did not perform Hajj’. So Rasool-Allah<sup>saww</sup> said to him: ‘Perform Hajj on his behalf, for that would suffice him from it’.
en.sarwar: 13. Abu Ali ai-Ash’ariy has narrated from Muhammad ibn ‘Abd af-Jabbar from Safwan ibn Yahya from ibn Muskan from ‘Amir ibn ‘Amirah who has said the following: “I once asked abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, about the case of the issue that I had heard from him (the Imam) and he (the Imam) had said, ‘If a man dies owing Hajjahta al-Islam and a certain relative performs al-Hajj on his behalf it is sufficient.’ He (the Imam) said, ‘Yes, I can testify that my father, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, narrated to me from the Messenger of Allah, O Allah, grant compensation to Muhammad and his family worthy of their services to Your cause, that a man came to him and said, “O Messenger of Allah, my father has died without performing al-Hajj.” The Messenger of Allah, O Allah, grant compensation to Muhammad and his family worthy of their services to Your cause, said, ‘Perform al-Hajj on his behalf; it is sufficient for him.’”
